pkgmetadata.longdescription: Microsoft Azure SDK for PythonThis package is no longer being maintained. Use the [azure-monitor-query](httpspypi.orgprojectazure-monitor-query) package instead.For migration instructions, see the [migration guide](httpsaka.msazsdkpythonmigrateai-to-monitor-query). Release History 0.1.1 (2022-02-11) This package is no longer maintained. Use the [azure-monitor-query](httpspypi.orgprojectazure-monitor-query) package instead. 0.1.0 (2018-07-11)- Initial Release
